response: Profile: I am a dedicated, organized, and leadership-oriented professional with over 15 years of experience in medical transcription. I have expertise in medical terminology across various specialties, including Orthopedics, Cardiology, Gynecology, Psychiatry, Radiology, and more. I possess strong interpersonal skills, excellent teamwork abilities, and a commitment to continuous learning and skill development. I am reliable, dependable, and thrive in multi-tasking environments, excelling in transcription, supervision, and customer relationship management. My career includes roles as a Medical Scribe, Editor, and Supervisor, where I consistently delivered high-quality work while maintaining productivity and meeting turnaround times. I am passionate about contributing to the success of healthcare teams through accurate and timely transcription services. I hold certifications in medical transcription and have a strong background in using EHR systems and office software. I am a proactive team player with a positive attitude and a drive to take on new challenges.
